entities.label: biology
entities.description: scientific study of living things, especially their structure, function, growth, evolution, and distribution

entities.label: nervous system
entities.description: part of an animal that coordinates actions and senses

entities.label: diabetes
entities.description: group of metabolic disorders characterized by high blood sugar levels over a prolonged period

entities.label: enzyme
entities.description: large biological molecule that acts as a catalyst

entities.label: deoxyribonucleic acid
entities.description: molecule that encodes the genetic instructions used in the development and functioning of all known living organisms and many viruses

entities.label: obesity
entities.description: medical condition in which individuals have an excess of body fat

entities.label: nose
entities.description: organ that smells and facilitates breathing

entities.label: human
entities.description: any single member of Homo sapiens, unique extant species of the genus Homo

entities.label: Alzheimer's disease
entities.description: progressive, neurodegenerative disease characterized by memory loss

entities.label: myocardial infarction
entities.description: interruption of blood supply to a part of the heart

entities.label: metabolism
entities.description: set of chemical reactions and pathways by which living organisms transform chemical substances

entities.label: protein
entities.description: biomolecule or biomolecule complex largely consisting of chains of amino acid residues

entities.label: HIV/AIDS
entities.description: spectrum of conditions caused by HIV infection

entities.label: cigarette
entities.description: small roll of cut drug (typically tobacco) designed to be smoked
